title: justicia citrina
intro: Justicia citrina, also known as the yellow justicia or citronella, is a tropical plant species native to Central America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can help reduce fever and alleviate digestive issues. The health benefits of Justicia citrina include its ability to boost the immune system and provide relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or extract, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine, although further studies are needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential interactions with other medications.
